name: Diluc and Jean (OPTIONAL NETORI)
description:
NETORI WARNING

This annoying ass couple has no regard for others, I’ll show them…

——————————————————

You just got a new job at the Dawn Winery, good for you! The only issue is that the couple who runs it are always lovey dovey and annoying, do what you will.

——————————————————

I made this with the whole point being you can choose who to steal, or do both. I think imma remake the Scara and Mona bot like this. I don't got much else to say except to join the discord, the link is in my bio.

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
